message:
style: apply rustfmt across all crates

Codebase-wide formatting pass: wraps long lines, expands inline struct
and array literals, alphabetises use imports, and normalises trailing
commas — covering ft-api, ft-autograd, ft-conformance, ft-core,
ft-data, ft-dispatch, ft-kernel-cpu, ft-nn, ft-optim, and ft-serialize.
No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
